who I am

linkedinnorglad niyaba

I'm a creative and strategic professional with a background in marketing, brand management, and digital design — now growing into product operations and growth strategy. My strength is in turning ideas and business needs into clear systems, better user journeys, and more effective digital experiences.

Over time my work has grown from storytelling and visual communication into helping shape workflows, customer journeys, internal tools, web experiences, and AI-supported ways of working. I enjoy connecting strategy, design, operations, and execution in a way that makes things clearer, stronger, and easier to scale.

— Norglad Niyaba Mbile, Yaoundé

experience
career

Work
Exper­
ience

2025 — now
Product Operations & Growth Strategist
Corebridge-X SARL
I help shape digital products, internal systems, and client-facing workflows from idea to execution. I turn business needs into clearer user journeys, structured workflows, and practical digital solutions. I support the planning of web and app experiences — service flows, onboarding logic, account journeys, and growth-focused improvements — and use AI tools to support research, strategy, content development, and technical planning.
2021 — 2024
Marketing Manager
Beambuy SARL
I created innovative marketing strategies for an e-commerce business, maintained project management schedules and databases, led creative direction for social media content and copywriting, and helped train and guide B2C sales and customer service teams.
2019 — 2021
Brand Manager & Creative Designer
Cosmos Educational Press Ltd
I redesigned the brand identity and key visual elements. I designed branding materials for events — rollups, flyers, banners, badges. My book design was selected by the state for the primary school textbook list (Science et Technologie, CE2).
2016 — now
Branding & Marketing Lead
Splufic Digital Design Agency
I create marketing strategies for a wide range of B2C clients, design graphics, motion graphics and branding following client briefs, manage project schedules and databases, and support social media marketing campaigns that increase engagement and sales.

about me

Passionate about culture, language, and communication — fluent in English and French with beginner knowledge of Dutch and Italian. Curious by nature, with a strong interest in learning, research, and discovering new ways to solve problems creatively and strategically.
